div1.entryFree:
Staggers, 1) a sensation which makes to reel; giddiness, vertigo: does the world go round? How come these s. on me? Cymb. V, 5, 233.
2) perplexity, bewilderment: I will throw thee from my care for ever into the s. and the careless lapse of youth and ignorance, All's II, 3, 170.
3) a disease of horses indicated by staggering and falling down: spoiled with the s. Shr. III, 2, 55.
